description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious driveway at the front. The structure has a dark, multi-gabled roof and a predominantly white and gray facade, with large windows and a prominent front porch. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and landscaped green areas with palm trees and outdoor seating. The garage is attached to the right side of the house, and the property is accented by various shrubs and small trees. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a mix of hardscaped and landscaped elements. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large windows, a front porch, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, front porch, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, deck, green lawn, and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side garden, and the full extent of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
